title: YCAB unit model number nomenclature
summary: The model number YCAB indicates a York air-cooled scroll chiller/heat pump with specific configuration codes for capacity, voltage, and options.

title: YCAB 120 model cooling capacity
summary: The YCAB 120 model has a cooling capacity of 120 kW.

title: Leaving chilled water temperature setpoint range
summary: The leaving chilled water temperature setpoint can be adjusted between 5°C and 15°C.

title: High pressure fault
summary: A high pressure fault is indicated by code HP.

title: Low pressure fault
summary: A low pressure fault is indicated by code LP.

title: Flow switch fault
summary: A flow switch fault is indicated by code FL.

title: Freeze protection fault
summary: A freeze protection fault is indicated by code Fr.

title: Compressor overload fault
summary: A compressor overload fault is indicated by code OL.

title: Phase sequence fault
summary: A phase sequence fault is indicated by code PS.

title: Sensor fault
summary: A sensor fault is indicated by code Sn.

title: Communication fault
summary: A communication fault is indicated by code CO.

title: High temperature fault
summary: A high temperature fault is indicated by code HT.

title: Low superheat fault
summary: A low superheat fault is indicated by code LS.

title: High discharge temperature fault
summary: A high discharge temperature fault is indicated by code Hd.

title: Low suction temperature fault
summary: A low suction temperature fault is indicated by code LS.

title: Condenser fan fault
summary: A condenser fan fault is indicated by code CF.

title: Evaporator pump fault
summary: An evaporator pump fault is indicated by code EP.

title: Low water temperature fault
summary: A low water temperature fault is indicated by code Lt.

title: High water temperature fault
summary: A high water temperature fault is indicated by code Ht.

title: Low ambient temperature lockout
summary: A low ambient temperature lockout is indicated by code LA.

title: High ambient temperature lockout
summary: A high ambient temperature lockout is indicated by code HA.

title: Voltage protection fault
summary: A voltage protection fault is indicated by code VP.

title: Current protection fault
summary: A current protection fault is indicated by code CP.

title: Emergency stop fault
summary: An emergency stop fault is indicated by code ES.

title: Fire alarm fault
summary: A fire alarm fault is indicated by code FA.

title: Remote start/stop fault
summary: A remote start/stop fault is indicated by code RS.

title: Clock fault
summary: A clock fault is indicated by code CL.

title: Memory fault
summary: A memory fault is indicated by code ME.

title: Keypad fault
summary: A keypad fault is indicated by code KP.

title: Display fault
summary: A display fault is indicated by code DP.

title: BMS communication fault
summary: A BMS communication fault is indicated by code BC.

title: Unit capacity mismatch fault
summary: A unit capacity mismatch fault is indicated by code UC.

title: Compressor rotation fault
summary: A compressor rotation fault is indicated by code CR.

title: Oil pressure fault
summary: An oil pressure fault is indicated by code OP.

title: Crankcase heater fault
summary: A crankcase heater fault is indicated by code CH.

title: Economizer fault
summary: An economizer fault is indicated by code EC.

title: Hot gas bypass fault
summary: A hot gas bypass fault is indicated by code HG.

title: Liquid line solenoid fault
summary: A liquid line solenoid fault is indicated by code LL.

title: Suction line solenoid fault
summary: A suction line solenoid fault is indicated by code SL.
